lock_policy: Dated official pick files are append-only. Re-running the engine for the same date reuses the existing dated file instead of changing official picks.
note: Official picks require market edge, model probability >= 72%, Lab Rating >= 8.0/10, pitcher support, and no major bullpen caution.

labScoreBreakdown.note: Lab Rating grades setup quality. It is not win probability.

pick_team.label: Fresh
pick_team.workload_read: Low recent workload. No major bullpen fatigue flag from the last three days.
pick_team.score_reason: Fresh (2.2/10): 5.3 relief innings over the last three days, without allowing a run. 4 reliever appearances in the window.
pick_team.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

opponent.label: Normal
opponent.workload_read: Manageable recent workload. Bullpen should still be part of the full-game read.
opponent.score_reason: Normal (4.8/10): 8 relief innings over the last three days — 5 of them in the last game, allowing 3 runs. 6 reliever appearances in the window.
opponent.formula: 45 + ((Last 3 BP IP - 9) x 3.5) + ((Last game BP IP - 3) x 4) + (Back-to-back arms x 6) + clamp((Last 3 BP runs - 4) x 1.5, -6, 12)

context_only.note: Reliever counts are displayed for context only and do not add score points.

moneyline.why: Detroit Tigers is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 80.1% model win probability and 9.2/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 80.1% against a 58.4% no-vig market number, a 21.7% model edge at -149. Detroit Tigers owns the starting pitcher edge by 43 points. Bullpen read: Supports LyDia side. Lineup check: Detroit Tigers is near its season form (-0.006 OPS); Los Angeles Angels is a touch below its season form (-0.027 OPS).
moneyline.risk: No model can see every live lineup, injury, or late bullpen availability update. Recheck official news before first pitch.

moneyline.why: Washington Nationals is an official moneyline pick because it clears both gates: 74.1% model win probability and 9.0/10 Lab Rating. LyDia projects 74.1% against a 56.8% no-vig market number, a 17.3% model edge at -138. Washington Nationals owns the starting pitcher edge by 52 points. Bullpen read: Neutral. Lineup check: Washington Nationals is swinging a hot bat (+0.093 OPS); Athletics is in a cold stretch (-0.097 OPS). Recent form supports this side as well.
